tasks.title: Card Redeem screen — replace placeholder with real UI
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Users can redeem a gift card from the card detail screen with confirmation flow and balance update
tasks.notes: Built CardRedeemScreen with batch Firestore writes, copy-to-clipboard, screenshot prevention

tasks.title: Transaction Detail screen — replace placeholder with real UI
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Users can view full transaction details including amount, date, merchant, card, and description from the activity screen
tasks.notes: Built TransactionDetailScreen with color-coded amounts, type badges, shimmer loading

tasks.title: Support screen — replace placeholder with real UI
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Users can access help via FAQ, email support link, and in-app feedback form from profile > support
tasks.notes: Built SupportScreen with searchable FAQs, contact section, feedback bottom sheet

tasks.title: Delete Account — fix routing (currently goes to DataExportScreen)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Delete Account button on profile navigates to a dedicated confirmation screen with account deletion flow, not the data export screen
tasks.notes: Fixed routing, built DeleteAccountScreen with type-DELETE confirmation, Cloud Function call

tasks.title: Biometric toggle — implement Firestore update
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Biometric Unlock toggle on profile screen persists the setting to Firestore and the user model reflects the change
tasks.notes: Implemented onChanged handler with Firestore update in profile_screen.dart

tasks.title: Avatar upload — implement image picker on profile
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Tapping the profile avatar opens an image picker, uploads to Firebase Storage, and updates the user document avatarUrl

tasks.title: Firestore rules — add field-level validation constraints
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Firestore rules enforce field types, required fields, and value constraints to prevent invalid data writes even if Cloud Functions are bypassed
tasks.notes: Added validUserData(), validCardData(), validTransactionData() to firestore.rules

tasks.title: Fix Flutter analysis warnings
tasks.notes: Removed unnecessary import in main.dart. 0 issues reported.

tasks.title: Deploy Firebase rules, indexes, and Cloud Functions
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Firestore rules, indexes, storage rules, and all 9 Cloud Functions are deployed to vaulted-app-c89d2
tasks.notes: Firebase CLI v15.11.0 available. Checking auth status.

tasks.title: Deploy Flutter web to Firebase Hosting
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Flutter web app is accessible at production URL with all security headers and SPA routing working
tasks.notes: Firebase Hosting not yet configured in firebase.json. Will add hosting config.

tasks.title: Smoke test — verify auth flow works on production
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Registration, login, and protected route access works on the deployed URL with no console errors

tasks.title: Smoke test — verify card CRUD and transactions on production
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Adding a card, viewing card detail, and seeing transactions works on the deployed URL
